allowed_values_or_rule: stable identifier such as train_fold_YYYYMM or validation_fold_YYYYMM
purpose: Identifies each future purged/embargo split without rerunning validation in this checkpoint.
notes: Design-only field; no split is generated here.

allowed_values_or_rule: monotonic fold identifier scoped to one validation design
purpose: Links train, purge, embargo, and validation windows.
notes: Future reports should keep fold IDs immutable.

allowed_values_or_rule: monthly date group based on feature_date or label_start month
purpose: Defines the atomic time bucket for purged validation.
notes: Current local ML baseline uses monthly walk-forward context.

allowed_values_or_rule: days|months|bars
purpose: Records the unit for future label horizon.
notes: Must be explicit before any serious ML v2 training.

allowed_values_or_rule: positive integer only
purpose: Records the forward label span.
notes: No label horizon is changed in this checkpoint.

allowed_values_or_rule: date >= feature_date
purpose: Marks when the future outcome window starts.
notes: Future implementation should derive it deterministically.

allowed_values_or_rule: date >= label_start_date
purpose: Marks when the future outcome window ends.
notes: Baseline audit recorded max_label_end=2026-06-18.

allowed_values_or_rule: non-negative integer; at least label horizon overlap risk
purpose: Removes training rows whose labels overlap validation windows.
notes: Future value must be justified by label horizon.

allowed_values_or_rule: validation_start_date - purge_window_days
purpose: Defines rows excluded before validation.
notes: Schema only; no rows excluded here.

allowed_values_or_rule: validation_start_date - 1 day or equivalent group boundary
purpose: Completes the pre-validation purge interval.
notes: Use date-group boundary if monthly grouping is used.

allowed_values_or_rule: non-negative integer documented per validation design
purpose: Reserves post-validation buffer before future train rows can resume.
notes: Embargo may be zero only with explicit justification.

allowed_values_or_rule: validation_end_date + 1 day or next group boundary
purpose: Defines the start of embargoed rows.
notes: Schema only; no validation rerun.

allowed_values_or_rule: validation_end_date + embargo_window_days
purpose: Defines the end of embargoed rows.
notes: Use monthly boundary if date_group is monthly.

allowed_values_or_rule: must be <= approved cutoff and documented in source report
purpose: Carries forward the pre-cutoff safety boundary.
notes: Existing local reports cite train_cutoff=2026-06-18.

allowed_values_or_rule: False required for paper-only ML v2 readiness
purpose: Explicitly blocks post-cutoff rows from training.
notes: Any True value should block training readiness.

allowed_values_or_rule: False unless a future approved validation report says otherwise
purpose: Separates pre-cutoff validation from future OOS evidence.
notes: No OOS rerun is allowed by this checkpoint.

allowed_values_or_rule: must be <= feature_usable_from and <= split train/validation decision time
purpose: Records point-in-time feature visibility.
notes: Use PIT metadata from future feature tables.

allowed_values_or_rule: must be <= decision timestamp for the row
purpose: Records earliest safe use time.
notes: No external data is fetched or merged here.

allowed_values_or_rule: PASS|WARN|BLOCK
purpose: Stores the outcome of future schema checks.
notes: This plan is not itself a validation result.

allowed_values_or_rule: path to approved future report or not_available
purpose: Links future validation evidence to source artifacts.
notes: Use not_available until a future report exists.
